plugins.name: platform-skills
plugins.description: Practical guidance for platform engineers: Kubernetes, Helm, Terraform, GitOps, GitHub Actions, composite GitHub Actions (interview-driven scaffold → full repo: action.yml + README + test/release workflows + dependabot.yml + actionlint config; PR creation on existing repos via gh; SHA pinning; secrets-as-inputs; ::add-mask::; $GITHUB_OUTPUT chaining; $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY; input validation; log grouping; inline annotations; multi-OS; idempotency; breaking-change guide; actionlint; migrate mode: extract repeated steps into composite action; publish mode: Marketplace checklist — 11 production-ready examples: docker-build-push, notify-slack, k8s-deploy (EKS/AKS/GKE OIDC, kubelogin, no static secrets), terraform-plan, security-scan, release-tag, pr-comment, setup-env, configure-cloud (EKS/AKS/GKE OIDC via configure-aws-credentials/azure-login/WIF), setup-terraform, db-migrate; reusable workflow vs composite decision guide; private repo access patterns; org mono-repo strategy), AWS (CloudFront + OAC, WAF WebACL, Lambda@Edge, CloudFront Functions, Firewall Manager multi-account enforcement, IAM/IRSA), Azure, Linkerd, Linux, networking, MCP server development, observability (Prometheus/OpenTelemetry/Grafana), code documentation (OpenAPI/docstrings), SOC 2 compliance for Terraform, Datadog, Dynatrace, conventional commit message generation, OPA/Conftest Rego policies, Kyverno admission policies (ValidatingPolicy/MutatingPolicy/GeneratingPolicy/ImageValidatingPolicy, CEL expressions, Audit→Deny promotion), comprehensive PR review (cost impact, environment drift, ownership governance, compliance, deprecated API upgrade, rollback feasibility), PR comment triage, KEDA event-driven autoscaling (ScaledObject, ScaledJob, TriggerAuthentication, Prometheus/SQS/Kafka/Redis/Cron/HTTP/Azure scalers, scale-to-zero, IRSA), supply chain security (Cosign keyless signing, Syft SBOM, Trivy/Grype CVE gates, SLSA Level 2, Kyverno ImageValidatingPolicy enforcement), Kubernetes runtime security (Falco eBPF, custom rules, Falcosidekick alert routing, Kyverno bridge), Chaos Engineering (Litmus Chaos v3, Chaos Mesh v2, steady-state hypothesis, blast radius scoping, GameDay workflow, DORA feedback loop), and DORA Metrics (Deployment Frequency, Lead Time, Change Failure Rate, MTTR — GitHub Actions instrumentation, Prometheus recording rules, Grafana dashboards, AMP variant). Covers troubleshooting, security-first patterns, DevEx, RFC/ADR, compliance controls, and working examples — at any scale, LLM Observability (Datadog LLMObs instrumentation, pup CLI, Datadog Labs skills — dd-apm, dd-logs, dd-monitors, eval bootstrap, trace RCA, experiment analysis), animated Markdown document generation (architecture flow, lifecycle loop, field carousel, timeline phases — GitHub-safe CSS animations, convert existing docs, diff for staleness, export to Confluence/Notion)
